top_signals.title: Minutes from the ECB’s June meeting confirm rise in inflation risks
top_signals.summary: Central bank’s baseline projections showed above-target inflation despite the inclusion of almost three rate rises
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: US renews strikes against Iran
top_signals.summary: Also in today’s newsletter, political rhetoric around the ‘Epstein class’ is gaining traction among Democratic candidates
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Italy expels Russian diplomats suspected of running spy ring
top_signals.summary: Expulsion comes after arrest of two retired Italian intelligence officers who allegedly passed on information to Moscow

top_signals.summary: European Commission launches probe into alleged dumping of subsidised meat

top_signals.summary: Former Manchester mayor moves a step closer to being Britain’s next prime minister

top_signals.title: Notice: Notices made under s32A of the Taxation (Cross-border Trade) Act 2018
top_signals.summary: Notices made which have the force of law under s32A of the Taxation (Cross-border Trade) Act 2018.

top_signals.title: Statutory guidance: Reference Document for The Customs Tariff (Establishment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2020
top_signals.summary: Find the UK’s most favoured nation tariff rates as referenced in The Customs Tariff (Establishment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2020.

top_signals.title: NSA revives 'Tailored Access Operations' name for elite hacking unit
top_signals.summary: NSA last week changed the moniker of its Office of Computer Network Operations (CNO) back to Tailored Access Operations (TAO), a name that is sure to elicit nostalgia among the broader digital community for a group with roots in the early 1990s.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
